member.name: T:TokenNftInfoQuery
member.summary:
A query that returns information about a non-fungible token (NFT).
You request the info for an NFT by specifying the NFT ID.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: P:TokenNftInfoQuery.NftId
member.summary: Sets the NFT ID for which information is requested.

member.name: P:TokenNftInfoQuery.TokenId
member.summary: Sets the Token ID and the index range for which information is requested.
member.param: The ID of the token for which information is requested

member.name: P:TokenNftInfoQuery.AccountId
member.summary: Sets the Account ID for which information is requested.
member.param: The Account ID for which information is requested

member.name: P:TokenNftInfoQuery.Start
member.summary: Sets the start of the index range for which information is requested.
member.param: The start index (inclusive) of the range of NFTs to query for. Value must be in the range [0; ownedNFTs-1]

member.name: P:TokenNftInfoQuery.End
member.summary: Sets the end of the index range for which information is requested.
member.param: The end index (exclusive) of the range of NFTs to query for. Value must be in the range (start; ownedNFTs]
